title: Website updates
assignees: Ethan Vandenberg, Justyna Acosta, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
The client set many updates for the site. 1. will probably mostly be SEO, as he wants to replace the plumbing dropdown with span panels. I know there are a lot of requests, but any additional info we need from the client or next steps to take on any of these would be great. Please add or let me know who else needs to be added to this discussion.

From the client:
"1. Here is the link for Logos, images, and some SPAN resources.
     https://www.span.io/website-resources
     https://www.span.io/app
     Here is a link to their Google Drive SPAN "Asset Ki.t"
     https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1sNOrK3t6o0BM4vRVP732gakrUVRq-Znx?usp=sharing

2. Here is the link for Qmerit. We do hundreds of car chargers for them a year; they are a massive national brand for homeowners buying electric vehicles. This is their certified installer page, and the middle of the page is the image for their certified installer. I could not find a widget or anything for the badge. https://qmerit.com/certified-network/

3. Attached to this email are the Tesla marketing guidelines with the certified badges and other materials. 
4. Attached are also Generac guidelines with certified installer logos inside
5. Badges I would like on the website; however, you want to format them:
Span Certified Installer image
Qmerit Certified Installer Image
Tesla Certified installer badge 
Generac Certified Badge
SMUD

6. Also need a participating rebates part of the website, as we partake in all these rebates. I just attached a competitor's website page. We are exactly the same as them.  (there are 3 rebates)
https://atticmanhvac.com/rebates/

7. The Book Appointment button (black button, top right) on the website is linked to Schedule Pro inside of Service Titan. Since we cancelled, it is no longer active. Can we remove and switch it out for a request service or something that goes to a website submission form to our service email?

title: Client reporting drops
description:
The client reached out with the following question reportign that leads have really dropped off this month. Is there anything on our end that could explain this? Please add anyone else you feel should be included in this discussion.

Direct from client:
Hey guys! quick question for the team.
Last 30 days, my lead volume, and from what I can tell, rankings and search volume have drastically dropped. LSA volume is down about 70% from our monthly average for the last 12 months. If I’m searching electrician in Roseville where we are located we are not showing up. 
Thoughts? Any ideas for us?

Can you please provide a summary of the work done recently on this campaign? Corey would like to have as much as he can to present to the client. Please let me know if you need more details or have any questions for me.

title: Optimize On-Page Content / Local SEO Service Page for Sacramento
description:
Reasoning and Goal:
The current "unoptimised" version lacks semantic structure, topical depth, and EEAT signals required for high local SEO performance. By aligning the content with the optimised version, we aim to: 

  • Improve Google’s understanding via structured semantic triples.

  • Increase topical authority by expanding HVAC service variations.

  • Strengthen local relevance with contextual city references and service anchors.

  • Enhance conversion with trust elements like licensing, financing, and technician credentials.

  • Trigger rich results with FAQ schema-ready formatting.

This task ensures the page meets Google's Helpful Content and EEAT guidelines while becoming competitive for HVAC-related queries in the Sacramento area.

Page URL: https://maverickelectricalservices.com/sacramento-ca/

Semantic SEO Analysis– Mavericks Electrical (Sacramento, CA)
https://docs.google.com/document/d/10d9q1CC4YBkfz1TygPsD6ULm_3yBfU6jKsYBhT7CBek/edit?usp=sharing

Optimized Content Document Link:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/18jqvcLbqYpScwghAdpODI8VrHS_FFrMOr4ATyCflOKM/edit?usp=sharing

title: Welcome Email
description: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1s9-e7o19rttsfSAGtPf3J7CPr_VigrUkW5089s9CXBQ/edit?usp=sharing

title: Establish LSA Access
description:
1. Pull the CID from the onboarding form (found under "CLIENT WORKBOOK" door on the project's front page, then the "Project Details" tab. Should be ROW 28.)
  2. Send a management request using the Google Ads interface. TUTORIAL
  3. Verify that the management request was sent. TUTORIAL
  4. Send the client an email advising them to look out for the management request. >>> USE THIS EMAIL TEMPLATE <<<
  5. Check this off once the client has accepted the management request.

title: Add client to LSA Master Sheet
description:
MASTER SHEET

This includes:
  1. Adding the client to the "LSA DIRECTORY" tab
  2. Adding the client's master sheet tab to the project and linking it accordingly in the directory

TUTORIAL

title: Forward client to rep for review
description:
Submit a review request to our Google rep using the REP REQUESTS SHEET

Paste findings under the "Audit Review Call" task to be reviewed on the call

TUTORIAL

title: Order LSA Dashboard(s)
description:
1. Navigate to the Blackcoffer chat; LINK
  2. Provide them with the CID(S) and CLIENT NAME
  3. Log the request in the Master Sheet under "DASHBOARD REQUESTS"
TUTORIAL

title: Schedule audit review call
description:
Set up a time with the client to review their audit together. >>> USE THIS TEMPLATE <<<

Take notes on action items to send to the client after the meeting has been conducted.

Once scheduled, add the date and time to the "Audit Review Call" task

title: Implement completed dashboard
description:
1. Create a vanity URL using Rebrandly.com (format: /ClientName)
  2. Add completed dashboard link to the Master Sheet in the client's "LSA DIRECTORY" line
  3. Add the dashboard as a door on the project
  4. Ensure the dashboard is set to "Unlisted"
TUTORIAL

title: Audit Review Call
description:
• Walk the client through their dashboard
  • Review LSA rep findings
  • Done-with-you audit
  • Validate:
    • Address
    • Phone number
    • Message lead number
    • Business hours
    • Listed attorneys
